title: draba lasiophylla
intro: Draba lasiophylla, also known as the woolly rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function, which can help to prevent illnesses and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Draba lasiophylla are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support immune health.
